title: Add AI Clip Finder to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Clip Finder](https://kenz1s-ai-clip-finder.hf.space/) to video_audio
- Transcribe long videos and identify high-impact moments using LLMs with AI Clip Finder, a FastAPI backend for automated video clipping and social media content creation.

Fixes #8919

gist.headline: Director's cut, automated
gist.blurb: Someone built a tool to watch your long videos and find the good parts so you don't have to. AI Clip Finder is now in the community showcase.
gist.summary: Added AI Clip Finder to the community showcase, a FastAPI backend that transcribes long videos and uses LLMs to automatically extract high-impact moments.
gist.impact: Video creators can now automate the tedious process of finding social-ready clips from long-form content.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a video editor, cutting a glowing film strip with pixelated scissors, alongside the Monitor Robot displaying video frames.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, using pixelated scissors to cut a glowing film strip. A chunky retro monitor robot sits nearby displaying a video frame on its screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
